segments.text_markup:
[somber] On a morning in eighteen sixty-five, <break time="400ms"/> the President of the United States walked into a theater
he would NEVER walk out of.

[measured] Washington was a bustling city of mud and ambition.
<break time="650ms"/>
The war had ended only days before, and the streets were still LOUD with celebration.

[ominous] But one man in the crowd was not celebrating.
He had a plan, <break time="300ms"/> a pistol, <break time="300ms"/> and a grievance that history would never FORGET.
